name: any2ppt
description: A practical production workflow for turning source material into presentation-ready deck briefs, storyboards, and slide visual prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Turn source material into presentation-ready deck plans.
interface.longDescription: Any2PPT coordinates a budget-aware deck production workflow: understand source material, shape the argument, plan slide storyboards, direct visuals, and check the result before delivery.
defaultPrompt: Turn this transcript into a deck storyboard.
Create slide prompts from this outline.
Review this deck plan for weak slides.
